listings.title: Plantronics BackBeat FIT 500 Wireless Sport Headphones - Like New
listings.body: I'm selling my Plantronics BackBeat FIT 500 On-Ear Sport Headphones in perfect working condition. I recently received another set as a gift and don't need to keep both. Features: - Bluetooth connectivity with ability to connect to two devices simultaneously - Up to 16 hours of battery life on a single charge - P2i military-grade nano-coating for sweat and moisture protection - Memory foam headband and earcups for comfort - Includes 3.5mm cable for wired listening option - On-ear controls for music and calls Condition: Perfect working order, well-maintained, no damage or issues What's Included: Headphones, charging cable, and 3.5mm audio cable Great for workouts, commuting, or everyday listening. Lightweight and comfortable for extended wear.

listings.title: Audio-Technica AT-LP60X-GM Fully Automatic Belt-Drive Stereo Turntable
listings.body: Audio-Technica AT-LP60X-GM Fully Automatic Belt-Drive Stereo Turntable, Gunmetal/Black, Hi-Fidelity, Plays 33-1/3 and 45 RPM Vinyl Records, Dust Cover, Anti-Resonance, Die-Cast Aluminum Platter It has a bit of scratches

listings.title: Metabo Burnishing Kit (Made in Germany) - New in Box
listings.body: Thought I would use this burnisher to polish my stainless steel tables but am too lazy.  Comes with all original accessories and 3 pack  non-woven fleece belt meant to polish table legs.  There is a dent on the side of the metal box.  No low ballers, please.  I'm in no rush to sell. https://www.amazon.com/Metabo-602259620-SE17-200-Burnishing-Machine/dp/B07C3TQ9JV https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B000VE6DCE/ref=ppx_yo_dt_b_search_asin_title?ie=UTF8&psc=1 Please note that I live in northern Westchester and only free to meet up in NYC on Sunday (sometimes Saturday) morning and meet curbside in Manhattan's Inwood, Eastside/Downtown Brooklyn, Navy Yard, Ft. Greene, Clinton Hill, North Williamsburg, Greenpoint, LIC/Queens or along the Sprain/Taconic. Other locations on a case-by-case basis, and with a small fee to cover time and gas.  I would need to know by Friday afternoon.  This is a bit bulky and heavy (~ 45 lbs) so having a car is advised if you're not by one of the meetup locations.  Preference for meeting up in Inwood or Chinatown when in NYC. When replying, let me where and when you would like to meet meet along with your phone number. Cash and carry.  All sales final. Ad will be deleted once sold. Polisher/Burnisher

listings.title: Air Conditioner through the wall
listings.body: Brand New 14000 BTU. 230V got it as a gift but my outlet not compatible. Please Buy. Im not using it its useless taking up space. Negotiable. Element is the Brand. Thank you.

listings.title: PS5 Brand New Disc Version (Never opened)
listings.body: I have a brand new PS5. I bought it & never used it. It was a backup in case mine broke & now I work a lot. I’m in westchester. Can pick it up or deliver it within reason. Zelle or cash works. Model - CFI-1215A This is the last model revision of the original (Fat) version. It’s well sought after & if left unopened will likely increase in price.
